title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!
